zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran於1288年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特時，她的父親Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"19歲，母親Dornagilla MacLachlan16歲。她和William de Striveling至少有1個兒子。她去世於1323年在英國蘇格蘭享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran于1288年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特时，她的父亲Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"19岁，母亲Dornagilla MacLachlan16岁。她和William de Striveling至少有1个儿子。她去世于1323年在英国苏格兰享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran was born in 1288, in Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach", was 19 and her mother, Dornagilla MacLachlan, was 16. She had at least 1 son with William de Striveling. She died in 1323, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran est née en 1288, à Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach", avait 19 ans et sa mère, Dornagilla MacLachlan, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William de Striveling. Elle est décédée en 1323, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lorn, argyllshire, scotland: Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran 1288 in Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" 19 und ihre Mutter Dornagilla MacLachlan 16. Sie hatte mit William de Striveling mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1323 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con William de Striveling. Morì nel 1323, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoranが1288年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトで生まれた時，父Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"は19歳，母Dornagilla MacLachlanは16歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Strivelingとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1323年にイギリススコットランドで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran(이)가 1288년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dornagilla MacLachlan(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 William de Striveling(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran родилась в 1288 г. в местности аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Dornagilla MacLachlan, 16. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William de Striveling. Она умерла в 1323 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con William de Striveling. Murió en 1323, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
